title: feat: add Platform column to APPS.md and ecosystem page
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Every app finds its place
gist.blurb: The ecosystem just got organized. We've added platform badges to every app so you know exactly where to run that cool new tool.
gist.summary: Introduced a Platform taxonomy to the apps registry, backfilling 500+ entries and updating the UI to display badges for Web, Discord, CLI, and more.
gist.impact: Users can now instantly see where an app runs, making the ecosystem easier to navigate.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the monitor robot organizing a library of software. They are placing specific labels (Web, Bot, CLI) on glowing boxes on shelves. Represents the new categorization system.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot and a cute robot organizing a wooden shelf of glowing boxes. They are sticking pixel labels like 'WEB' and 'BOT' on them. Lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach background. Warm lighting, organized vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic.
